item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Casemiro to join Messi or Ronaldo when he leaves Man United?
item.description: Manchester United midfielder Casemiro is drawing interest from Lionel Messi's Inter Miami and Cristiano Ronaldo's Al Nassr. Transfer Talk has the late...

item.title: U.S. cruises to set up 'exciting' Canada showdown
item.description: Jack Hughes scored two goals, and the U.S. rolled into the final by routing Slovakia 6-2 in the semifinals Friday night. The U.S. will meet tournament...

item.title: Mayweather to unretire after Tyson exhibition
item.description: Former boxing superstar Floyd Mayweather Jr. says he is unretiring and will resume his undefeated career after his planned exhibition bout against Mik...

item.title: UCLA's Cronin apologizes to player for ejection
item.description: UCLA coach Mick Cronin said Friday he apologized to Steven Jamerson II for sending the center to the locker room late in a blowout loss at No. 15 Mich...

item.title: Smith-Njigba: Believe I deserve to be top-paid WR
item.description: Jaxon Smith-Njigba said he isn't overly concerned about getting a new deal done with the Super Bowl champion Seahawks. But when he does, the 2025 AP O...
